author: Luca Mignatti
name: Record: 11L HWNODE (Continuous Matrix ODE) + Cubric N-gram (val_bpb=0.5527)
blurb: Replaced standard multi-layer perceptrons (MLP) with 864-dim Hammerstein-Wiener Neural ODEs (HWNODE). This combines the Hammerstein-wiener model with Neural ODEs. This permits a neural ODE to be solved in linear time, thus expanding via a taylor series used to create N descrete unique non-linear layers  from one set of parameters.
